title: Agent Routing Contract
description: Schema for defining machine-readable agent routing rules.

agent.description: The name or identifier of the agent.

task_kinds.description: List of task categories this agent is meant to handle.

canonical_skill.description: The path or reference to the canonical skill module documentation.

requirements.description: A list of prerequisite requirements for executing this agent's task.

forbidden_routes.description: A list of routes or paths that this agent is strictly forbidden to take.

human_only.description: Flag to mark if the agent can only be explicitly invoked by human operators.
